meta.title: Wasan kalma na yau da kullum
meta.description: Ka gano kalmar da aka boye cikin kokari 6 (ko kasa). Sabuwar wasa kowace rana!
meta.keywords: Hausa, wasa, kalma, buga, online, gano, yau da kullum

unlimited.title: Play unlimited — no waiting
unlimited.description: Play unlimited Wordle in Hausa. No waiting — get a new word every time.

speed.title: Speed Streak — race the clock
speed.description: Speed Streak: solve as many Wordle words in Hausa as you can in 5 minutes.

dordle.description: Play Dordle in Hausa. Solve 2 Wordle boards at once with 7 guesses.

tridle.description: Play Tridle in Hausa. Solve 3 Wordle boards at once with 8 guesses.

quordle.description: Play Quordle in Hausa. Solve 4 Wordle boards at once with 9 guesses.

duotrigordle.description: Play Duotrigordle in Hausa. Solve 32 Wordle boards at once with 37 guesses.

word_detail.title: Wordle #{idx} — {date} — {word} | Amsar {langNative}
word_detail.description_without_def: Amsar Wordle {langNative} na {date} (#{idx}) ita ce {word}. Za ka iya gane ta cikin kokari 6?
word_detail.title_coming_soon: Wordle {langNative} #{idx} — Zai zo nan ba da jimawa ba
word_detail.description_coming_soon: Kalmar Wordle {langNative} #{idx}. Zai zo nan ba da jimawa ba.

word_archive.title: Wordle {langNative} — Duk Kalmomi | Tarihin Kalmomi
word_archive.description: Duba duk kalmomin Wordle {count} da suka gabata a {langNative}. Ga ma'anoni, fasahar AI, da kididdigar al'umma na kowace kalmar yau da kullum.

best_starting_words.title: Mafi Kyawun Kalmomin Farawa don Wordle a {langNative} — Wordle Global
best_starting_words.description: Bincike na bayanai kan mafi kyawun kalmomin farawa don Wordle a {langNative}. An jera bisa ga ɗaukar haruffa a cikin kalmomi {count}.

text.no_attempts: Ba ka gwada wata kalma ba tukuna!
text.share_challenge_win: Na warware Wordle na yau cikin {n}. Za ka iya fin fi ni?
text.share_challenge_lose: Ban iya warware Wordle na yau ba. Za ka iya?
text.hard_mode_position: Yanayin wuya: {letter} dole ne ya kasance a matsayi {position}
text.hard_mode_contains: Yanayin wuya: dole kalmar ta kunshi {letter}

help.title: Yadda Ake Wasa
help.text_1_2: Kowace kalmar da ka zaba dole ta kasance kalma mai haruffa biyar. Danna maballin enter don aika.
help.text_1_3: Bayan ka zaba, tiles za su canza launi don nuna wadanne haruffa ne daidai ko kusan daidai.
help.text_2_1: yana cikin kalmar kuma yana wurin da ya dace!
help.text_2_2: yana cikin kalmar, amma ba wurin da ya dace ba.
help.text_2_3: ba ya cikin kalmar da kake kokarin gano.
help.speed_explanation: You start with 5 minutes on the clock. Solve words to earn bonus time. Miss a word and you lose 30 seconds.
help.speed_scoring_explanation: Points = (7 − guesses) × 100 × combo multiplier. Consecutive solves build your combo up to 3x. A failed word resets your combo.
help.speed_pressure_explanation: Every 3 words solved, the timer speeds up. The longer you survive, the harder it gets.

ui.word_info_desc: Ma'ana da fasahar AI bayan wasa
ui.install_app_desc: Yi wasa ba tare da yanar gizo ba kuma sami gunkin app
ui.no_games_yet: Ba ka buga wasa ba tukuna. Zabi harshe don farawa!
ui.play_more_languages: Buga harsuna da yawa don ganin kididdiga na duniya!
ui.coming_soon: yana zuwa nan ba da jimawa ba!
ui.future_word: Ba a buga wannan kalmar ba tukuna. Dawo daga baya!
ui.daily_words_counting: kalmomi na kullum kuma suna karuwa
ui.difficulty_locked: Ba za a iya canza matsayi ba bayan hasashe
ui.easy_desc: An yarda da kowace kalma, ko da ba ta cikin kamus ba
ui.normal_desc: Hasashe dole ne ya kasance kalma mai inganci daga kamus
ui.hard_desc: Dole ne a yi amfani da alamomin da aka gano a hasashen da ke zuwa
ui.high_contrast_desc: Launuka masu dacewa da makafi launi
ui.streak_footer: Streak counts classic daily puzzles in any language. Play once a day to keep it going.
ui.mode_daily_desc: One word per day. 6 guesses. The classic.
ui.mode_unlimited_desc: Random words, no limit. Play as much as you want.
ui.mode_speed_desc: Race the clock. Solve as many words as you can before time runs out.
ui.mode_custom_desc: Pick a word, share a link. Challenge your friends.
ui.mode_party_desc: Play the same word with friends. See who solves it fastest.
ui.homepage_languages_counting: harsuna kuma ƙaruwa — ana ƙara su akai-akai.
ui.homepage_and_more_desc: Octordle, Semantic Explorer, Custom Word, Party Mode — da ƙari nan zuwa.

seo.play_in_languages_sub: Dukkan harsuna kyauta ne. Ba a buƙatar asusu.
seo.faq_title: Tambayoyi da ake yi sau da yawa
seo.footer: wordle.global — wasannin kalma na yau da kullum kyauta cikin 80+ harsuna
seo.tile_correct: yana cikin kalmar kuma a matsayi daidai.
seo.tile_semicorrect: yana cikin kalmar amma a matsayi kuskure.

value_props.title: 80+ harsuna
value_props.desc: Daga Larabci zuwa Yoruba. Wordle mafi girma da harsuna da yawa.

value_props.title: Ma'anonin kalmomi
value_props.desc: Koyi ma'anar kowace kalma bayan wasa.

value_props.title: Fasahar kalma ta musamman
value_props.desc: Kowace kalma tana da hoton ta.

value_props.title: Yana aiki ko'ina
value_props.desc: PWA — kowace na'ura. Ba tare da yanar gizo ba.

value_props.title: Kyauta har abada
value_props.desc: Ba asusu. Ba biyan kuɗi. Kawai yi wasa.

tips.title: Fara da wasulla
tips.text: CRANE ko ADIEU suna gwada haruffa na yau da kullum cikin sauri.

tips.title: Yi amfani da abin da ka sani
tips.text: Kore tsayayye. Rawaya motsa. Toka cire.

tips.title: Cire
tips.text: Kalma ta biyu ta gwada sababbin haruffa.

tips.title: Haruffa biyu
tips.text: Idan bai dace ba, yi tunani game da harafin da aka maimaita.

tips.title: Yanayin wuya
tips.text: Yana tilasta ka yi amfani da alamomin da aka tabbatar.

tips_speed.title: CRANE
tips_speed.text: Haruffa masu yawa suna ba da kyakkyawan dama.

tips_speed.title: Kada ka yi tunani sosai
tips_speed.text: Speed Streak yana ba da lada ga hankali.

tips_speed.title: Kare combo
tips_speed.text: Kalmar da ta kasa tana karya mai ninkaya.

tips_speed.title: Ƙarshen kalmomi
tips_speed.text: Gane tsarin da aka maimaita yana ajiye daƙiƙoƙi.

tips_multiboard.title: Faɗaɗa
tips_multiboard.text: Haruffa na yau da kullum don alamomi a dukkan allunan.

tips_multiboard.title: Madannai raba
tips_multiboard.text: Kore/toka a allunan daban yana rage zaɓuɓɓuka.

tips_multiboard.title: Allunan wuya
tips_multiboard.text: Mai da hankali a allon da ba a sani ba.

tips_multiboard.title: Kada ka ɓata
tips_multiboard.text: Na farko 2-3 don kalmomi masu bayani.

tips_multiboard.title: Haruffa iri ɗaya
tips_multiboard.text: Alluna biyu da E rawaya? E a sabon matsayi.

tips_multiboard.title: Ajiye hasashe
tips_multiboard.text: Ƙarin hasashe a ƙarshe yana yin bambanci.

seo.mode_desc_classic: Hasashe 6 don kalma ta haruffa 5. Yi amfani da alamomin launi.
seo.mode_desc_unlimited: Hasashe 6, haruffa 5. "Sake wasa" — ba iyaka ta yau da kullum.
seo.mode_desc_speed: Minti 3. Kowace kalma tana ba da lokaci (+60s ga 1, +10s ga 6). Kasa: 30s. Combo har 3x. Hanzari kowane 3.
seo.mode_desc_multiboard: {modeName}: alluna {boardCount}, hasashe {maxGuesses}. Hasashe a dukkan allunan. Da aka warware sun tsaya. Madannai raba.

faq.q: Yaya zan yi wasa Wordle a {langName}?

multiboard.a: Haruffa na yau da kullum. Madannai raba.

howto.name: Karanta alamomi
howto.text: Kore = daidai. Rawaya = kuskure. Toka = babu.
